text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: No! I'll never, ever forgive you!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: Hic! Sniffle... B-but...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like those girls are having a<n>fight. Just as
I'm about to go see if<n>things are okay, two familiar
faces<n>get there first.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Did you two have a fight? Everything<n>okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, don't cry... Umm, here! You<n>can use my
handkerchief!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine... I have one... Sniff.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'd like to hear what happened here,<n>but... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I know! Would you two like to have<n>some ice
cream with us?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: I want strawberry ice cream...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: And I want chocolate chip...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it! I'll go get some for<n>everyone right
now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Ines. Didn't you just say<n>money's pretty
tight for you this<n>month?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right! Payday's still a ways<n>off...
choice_data_list: I can pay for you all, if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?! I'll take you up on your<n>offer, then!

text_block_list.name: Girls
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the ice cream!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thanks for treating us too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you're both feeling better<n>now. So,
what were you fighting<n>about anyway?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: She told me she's moving away!<n>Just like that!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to go either, but I had to<n>come say
bye to you...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text:
So you're not gonna play with me<n>anymore, huh?
Then go! Go and play<n>with all your new friends
and forget<n>all about me!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: I... I don't want that!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: I don't want that either! I... Sniff!Hic!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: There, there. You two must really love<n>each other.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You know, I hang out with Ryan a lot.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I also spend time with my other<n>classmates
and meet up with friends<n>who live far away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Same! All my friends are important to<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: ...All of them?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's right! So even if you're far<n>apart, you'll still
be best friends as<n>long as you want to be!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: Okay... Sniff... Sorry for getting madat you. I wanna be friends with youforever.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: Th-then let's do it! Let's be best<n>friends for life!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: O-okay!
choice_data_list: It's great that you two made up!
Now you won't be lonely even if you're apart.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're very welcome! All's well that<n>ends well,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After parting with the two little girls,<n>we all start
walking back to the<n>academy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey Ryan, what would you do if I<n>went away
somewhere really far?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I'd be sad, but... our bond's<n>strong enough
to survive any<n>distance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, forget I said that! Haha! Wow, that<n>was
embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aw, come on, let me hear what you<n>said again!
What was that about our<n>bond?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text:
But we won't be able to play<n>whenever we want
anymore...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You can still call each other and meet<n>up on
weekends! That way, you<n>won't be lonely even if
you can't be<n>together every day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And you'll have even more fun when<n>you do get
to see each other because<n>it'll be so special!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: Ooh, okay! Yeah, it won't feel so<n>lonely that way!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Let's call each other lots and<n>lots!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
How about you shake hands, then?<n>Not to say
goodbye, but to promise<n>that you'll see each other
again!
